sections_cited: section 53 of the Sindh Land Revenue Act

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1186 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 4929/23 3.For hearing of main case 17-04-2024 Mr. Tariq G. Hanif Mangi, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Bakhshan Khan Mahar, Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G-Sindh. ***** After hearing the parties, this petition is dismissed along with listed application. Nevertheless, the petitioners are at liberty to file a Civil Suit against the impugned entry in terms of section 53 of the Sindh Land Revenue Act, 1967, which if filed shall be decided on its own merits. Meanwhile, status-quo shall be operated between both the parties. However, the petitioners shall file such Civil Suit etc. within a period of two months. If the Suit etc. is not filed in two months or if it is filed earlier than two months, whichever is earlier, facility or concession provided by this order in the shape of maintenance of status-quo between the parties would automatically expire. The petition along with listed application is disposed of accordingly in the above manner. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
